title: BlockHardcore
body:
# BlockHardcore is a Hardcore modpack. 
Builds and Explore with the fear of death ! Risk your life anytime! 
  Transform your adventure with difficults mechanics like hydratation! And discover another world with mods like Better Nether, Better End and Terralith ! This pack is for those who want to discover the fear of death in Hardcore Minecraft while still being able to be revive by your friends. There are a lot of structures and a lot of optimisation mods.
  
This modpack is optimized. 
 ** This modpack is in release but if you have questions or request feel free to contact me on discord Izouku ;) **
